OpenClaw 3.12 Update: New Dashboard v2 & Fast Mode Guide

Discover the massive OpenClaw 3.12 update featuring a completely redesigned Dashboard v2 and a new high-speed Fast Mode for OpenAI and Anthropic. This walkthrough covers the shift to plugin architecture for local models and essential security patches to keep your AI gateway secure.

00:00 - Intro & Update Overview
01:04 - Dashboard v2 Deep Dive
03:01 - New UI Features & Mobile Tabs
04:00 - Fast Mode for AI Models
05:33 - Local Model Plugins (Ollama & VLLM)
07:16 - Security & Device Token Updates
08:24 - Agent Improvements & Bug Fixes
09:29 - How to Update & AI Training
